name: com.nino.quadsim
description: Deterministic Unity quadrotor simulation package with sensors, control allocation, RPC, Python SDK integration, PX4 SITL tooling, and importable sample scenes.

samples.description: Importable QuadSim scenes with sample maps, terrain assets, prefabs, drone assets, and scene config.
PX4 bridge, confirmation script, offboard validation mission, requirements, and setup documentation.
Standalone headless visualization and utility tools such as the live UDP viewer.
